rows.protocol_note: Aligned baseline table states Claude Code CLI + Opus 4.6, N = 133, tolerance = 0%; internal alignment against OfficeQA Pro paper §3.2; correctness reported per question. Notes say baseline scores from OfficeQA Pro paper §3.2 (Databricks), agent harness Claude Code CLI + Opus 4.6, internal alignment verified against Oracle PDF configuration (60.90%). Integration summary: 133 total questions, 11 automated pipeline steps, 1 model evaluated, 4 configurations per model, 3 trial iterations, runtime about 6 hours, final status all models pass.
